findings.invariant_violated: Every credential automation uses grants only the authority its job requires.
findings.evidence: The deploy workflow authenticates with an account-wide administrator key; a compromised runner could delete unrelated production resources.
findings.why_proof_missed: No review ever scoped the token; it was reused from a human operator's console credentials.
findings.root_correction: Issue a deploy-scoped role limited to the target service and rotate the admin key.
